sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Mawhna’ zol zui kei in, Nazuih leh khial ding;
Khat vei zo phot lecin, A zom zawhnop
Pasal nakpi’n do in, Lung gulhna meilpi;
Jesuh en gige in, Hong zawh pih hi.
Tha hong pia hong kem ding hi;
Hong huh nuam hi topa in,

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Kholh pih gi lo peel in, kam hoih lo zang ke’n;
Jesuh en gige in, Hong zawhpih ding hi.
Hong huh na ding thungen in,
Hong huh nuam hi topa in,

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: I pukkhak zel hangin, Upna tawh zo ding;
Eite hong Honpa in, Tha hong
Jesuh en gige in, Hong zawhpih ding hi.
Hong huh na ding thungen in,
hong pia hong kem ding hi;
Hong huh nuam hi topa in,
